SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANDSINGER, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CISNEROS, DANIEL TERAN, CARLOS $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,635.00, DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
